content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (SecureField in App/LoginView.swift:6) but review info is placeholder: demo_user.txt="test", demo_password.txt="changeme", notes.txt="TBD".
Pierre: Apple rejects login-gated apps under 2.1 when reviewers cannot sign in and reach core features, and placeholder credentials like "test"/"changeme" almost guarantee a metadata-rejection loop. All three review_information files here are non-actionable stubs. Replace them with a working demo account and notes explaining how to reach the app's main functionality after sign-in.
